'''''Star Wars Weekly'' 49''' is the forty-ninth issue in the ''[[Star Wars Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[January 10]], [[1979]].

This issue includes part three of a four-part black & white reprinting of the story ''[[The Keeper's World]]'', originally published in color in [[Marvel Comics|Marvel UK]]' ''[[Pizzazz]]'' magazine.

==Contents==
*"[[Do You Know What Your Children Are?]]"
*"[[Caverns of Mystery!]]"
*"Tales of the galaxy: Visitation Part 2: With God on our side!"
*"The power of Warlock Part 5: Sacred Empire"
*"Tales of the Watcher: The cave of Shaggdorr!"
